verified.notes: SNAP has no age-specific eligibility threshold for seniors; it serves all low-income households regardless of age. Asset limits not found in provided official sources. Income limits derived from October 2025 update (effective through September 2026): 1 person gross limit $1,927/month, 2 people $2,596/month, based on 130% Federal Poverty Level standard referenced in search results. Phone number is Montana Public Assistance Helpline from official state DPHHS source.

programs.programName: Montana Low Income Home Energy Assistance Program (LIHEAP)

verified.notes: Income limits are annual figures for 2025-2026 program year (HH 1: $33,719; HH 2: $44,095) divided by 12 and rounded to nearest integer. Assets are countable non-business resources. No single statewide application phone found; apply via local offices or apply.mt.gov. Official state source.
